description: Allows a mob to follow the player that owns it.

can_teleport.description: Defines if the mob will teleport to its owner when too far away.

ignore_vibration.description: Defines if the mob should disregard following its owner after detecting a recent vibration.

max_distance.description: The maximum distance the mob can be from its owner to start following it. Applicable only when "can_teleport" is set to false.

post_teleport_distance.description: Defines how far (in blocks) the entity will be from its owner after teleporting. If not specified, it defaults to "stop_distance" + 1, allowing the entity to seamlessly resume navigation.

speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal

start_distance.description: The minimum distance the mob must be from its owner to start following it.

stop_distance.description: The distance at which the mob will stop following its owner.

title: minecraft:behavior.follow_owner
